name: Backend & API Development
description: NestJS microservices, REST and GraphQL APIs built for scale. Clean architecture, TypeScript, proper auth — ready to integrate with any frontend or third-party service.

name: AI / LLM Integration
description: Connect your product to Claude, GPT-4, or local LLMs. Prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, structured output, streaming — production-grade AI features, not just demos.

name: Payment & Fintech Systems
description: Stripe, PayPal, crypto payments, and custom billing logic. Subscription management, invoicing, webhook handling — built secure and compliant from day one.

name: Database & Infrastructure
description: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis — designed for your access patterns. Indexes, migrations, caching, and cloud deployment on GCP, AWS or your own Linux server.
